texto: Or is it the case that no one gets over anything? Is there really that much pain and suffering continuing right now at this minute, in millions of hearts, in bodies carrying on the burden of existence, trying to smile through tears for fleeting, passing moments here and there-when they can forget what happened to them, maybe even for whole hours at a time? Maybe that's what it is to live.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Koethi Zan que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Or is it the case that no one gets over anything? Is there really that much pain and suffering co…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, existence, fleeting, com foco em fleeting e forget.
